questions: What are the ABCDs of effective video creative?
How does the ABCDs framework guide ad creation?
qa.answer: ABCDs: Attract (grab attention early), Brand (integrate brand cues), Connect (make it emotional and relevant), Direct (guide with clear CTA). It improves ad recall and sales lift when applied consistently.
implication: Front‑load attention hooks; show brand/assets early and often.
Design for sound‑on/off and mobile; use pacing and framing for clarity.
Test variants aligned to ABCDs; promote winners to always‑on playbooks.
